productOptionsHtml:
Use this section for ordering rules: style number, price band, minimums, and stated production time from the supplier catalog. Final invoice may reflect decoration, proofs, rush, or freight.

FieldValue
Style #SB-2200
List price range$16.67 – $25.65 USD
Minimum quantity12
Stated production time10 days

Quantity pricing (USD)

Price per unit at each order-quantity break (from the live product page).

QuantityPrice (each)
12$25.65 each
24$19.27 each
48$18.88 each
96$18.17 each
288$17.45 each
600$16.67 each

Catalog highlights

  • Manual opening
  • All-fiberglass construction including shaft, ribs, tips, and ferrule
  • Extra-thick 14mm fiberglass black central shaft and 4.5mm upper support arms
  • Matching fabric case with shoulder strap
  • Hardwood maple handle ready for engraving logos, initials, or names

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

4-Color Process ▼

4-Color Process is only available on outer canopy panels or valances. It cannot be used in other locations. Minimum 12 PRINTS per setup, which can be achieved with 2 or more patio umbrellas. Alternatively, you can choose to not use all 12 prints, but the pricing will have the same minimum costs. The run charge cannot go below a minimum of $270.00(G). Minimum cost is $566.00(G) for a panel print and/or $416.00(G) for a valance print. Imprint area maximum is 12.75"W x 12.75"H for panel prints, and 12.75"W x 5"H for valance prints (this supersedes listed imprint areas on our entire patio umbrella line). Patio bases sold separately. PMS matching does not apply to Process printing since Pantone Coated inks are not used like in screenprinting. You can still choose to provide us with PMS numbers, as a reference. Rush orders are not available with Process printing.

DI-4CP

4-Color Process ▼

4-Color Process is only available on outer umbrella canopy panels. It cannot be used with undercanopy printing, wide tie printing, or case printing. Process color is not available for the SB-4675, SB-4676, or SB-4677 due to the special 2-ply fabric. PMS matching does not apply to Process printing since Pantone Coated inks are not used like in screenprinting. You may still provide us with PMS numbers as a reference. Rush orders are not available with process color printing. Art-related restrictions may apply, such as minimum line weights or clear space requirements. Price breaks for process color run charges are calculated per logo. We do not combine run charges to meet higher price breaks. EQP pricing applies to products only. Setups and run charges are excluded from those calculations.

DI-4CP

Laser Engraving on Handle ▼

We can custom laser logos on any wooden umbrella handle for $3.00C ea. (Individually personalized names $4.00C ea.) Artwork req. same as for umbrellas.

pers.

Individual personalization

Names must be supplied on a disc as a Word file typed in a column exactly as they will appear when lasered (we can change font). Allow 5-7 extra working days for delivery.

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — The Hole-In-One Golf Umbrella. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style SB-2200 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 10 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 12 units (per catalog line).
